name: io.github.VictoriaMetrics-Community/mcp-victorialogs
description: MCP Server for VictoriaLogs. Provides integration with VictoriaLogs API and documentation

environmentVariables.name: VL_INSTANCE_ENTRYPOINT
environmentVariables.description: URL to VictoriaLogs instance in single-instance mode. This is the default setup when VL_ENVIRONMENTS is not set.

environmentVariables.name: VL_INSTANCE_BEARER_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Authentication token for VictoriaLogs API in single-instance mode

environmentVariables.name: VL_ENVIRONMENTS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of named VictoriaLogs environments exposed by this MCP server, for example demo,staging,prod

environmentVariables.name: VL_DEFAULT_ENVIRONMENT
environmentVariables.description: Default environment used when a tool call omits env

environmentVariables.name: VL_INSTANCE_<ENV>_ENTRYPOINT
environmentVariables.description: Per-environment VictoriaLogs entrypoint. Required for every environment listed in VL_ENVIRONMENTS.

environmentVariables.name: VL_INSTANCE_<ENV>_BEARER_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Per-environment bearer token for VictoriaLogs API

environmentVariables.name: VL_INSTANCE_<ENV>_HEADERS
environmentVariables.description: Per-environment custom headers as comma-separated key=value pairs

environmentVariables.name: VL_INSTANCE_<ENV>_DEFAULT_TENANT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Per-environment default tenant ID in AccountID:ProjectID format

environmentVariables.name: MCP_DISABLED_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tools to disable
